entity.label: Ahimaaz
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father Ahinoam, the wife of Saul (1 Sam. 14:50).

nodes.label: Ahimaaz
nodes.description: The father Ahinoam, the wife of Saul (1 Sam. 14:50).

nodes.label: Ahinoam
nodes.description: The daughter of Ahimaaz, and wife of Saul (1 Sam. 14:50).

verses.text: And the name of Saul’s wife was Ahinoam, the daughter of Ahimaaz: and the name of the captain of his host was Abner, the son of Ner, Saul’s uncle.
